_comment: Straight road (가로) — traffic flows along one axis. Tripwire-only counting gives deduped bi-directional counts via supervision.LineZone (tracker_id deduped). No intersection_polygon. Operators: position y_ratio where vehicles are large enough for reliable detection (typically 0.50-0.65). Replace speed.source_quad pixel coordinates using calibration_studio.py + real-world metres between the TWO road markings you pick.
